title: festuca beckeri subsp. sabulosa
intro: Festuca beckeri subsp. sabulosa, also known as alpine blue fescue, is a perennial grass-like flowering plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Festuca beckeri subsp. sabulosa include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, and its potential to aid in wound healing. Festuca beckeri subsp. sabulosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for internal use, or applied topically as a poultice or salve for external applications.
